text: Delivered SpectralLaws bundle (laws/shared main — Typelevel pattern, no core/test->laws cycle) + SpectralLawSuite (laws test): 12 entries (10 ScalaCheck properties + 2 fixed), covering residual laws for all six public spectral APIs (eigSymmetric dense+Lanczos, eigNonsymmetric dense+Arnoldi with complex residuals in real arithmetic, Svds.svd two-sided, eigSymmetricGeneralized, Svds.gsvd reconstruction), orthogonality (Euclidean, B-weighted XtBX=I, GSVD well-determined-column contract), the parity-doc ordering-guarantee table (ascending symmetric, descending SVD, nonsymmetric criterion+pair-adjacency, GSVD ratio with Infinite-first/Zero-last), never-split k-or-k+1 membership, exact-rank-deficiency (incl. the GKL pending-right regression class), and generalized identities vs independent naive-reduction references. Stress-validated 300 iterations/property both platforms; shipped at 10. No API bug surfaced. Verified: laws 29/29 JVM+JS (was 17), core unchanged 285/282, parity 29/29, testAllFull (fullLinkJS) clean. Committed. This was the epic's final gating bead.
